_comment: Source of truth for hub/catalog/block title derivations. Used by post-mapper-fixer.py, post-inspector-fixer.py, and referenced in entity-mapper.md and oneentry-invariants.md §18. If you change this — update the references. ⚠ VERTICAL DEFAULTS: the dictionaries below (hub_titles, composite_catalog.genders/leaves, block_default_titles) are populated with fashion-shop / e-commerce vocabulary derived from the reference test project. For projects in other verticals (hotel, restaurant, LMS, B2B SaaS, etc.) extend with the vertical's actual hub identifiers OR override via a per-project config. The derivation algorithm is universal; only the vocabulary is vertical-specific. Adding entries does not break existing projects (lookup is identifier-keyed); removing entries may break a vertical's fallback titles.

composite_catalog._comment: Composite catalog-leaf pages: identifier = '{gender_or_hub}-{category}'. Built deterministically from <gender> + <category>, NOT hallucinated (§18 exception). Genders supplied by hub_titles[<gender>] when present; categories by hub_titles[<leaf>]. Possessive form for gender is used: 'women' -> "Women's", 'men' -> "Men's". Example: 'women-accessories' -> "Women's Accessories".

block_default_titles._comment: Defaults for blocks with null title from source. Used as fallback when post-mapper-fixer didn't find a real <h1>/<h2>/SECTION_TITLES in the component source. These are UX defaults (deterministic identifier -> neutral human label), not hallucinations (§18 exception for blocks).
